title: preparedview.regenerate
description: Create a reviewable filesystem plan that regenerates a previously prepared (and possibly removed) project source view from the canonical database. Removed views have an indefinite regenerable lifetime (A4). The response plan_id enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline (approve → apply). All spec 017/025 error codes can surface during apply. Allowed only when the owning project lifecycle is setup_incomplete|ready|prepared|processing|blocked|completed; refused on archived with lifecycle.read_only (R-026-Lifecycle). Envelope sweep deferred (E-026-1). Status: NOT IMPLEMENTED.

view_id.description: Identifier of the PreparedSourceView to regenerate.

plan_id.description: Identifier of the produced ViewRegenerationPlan (a FilesystemPlan with origin prepared_view_regeneration). Regeneration always creates a new plan and never reuses a removal plan. The plan enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline: approve then apply.

view.not_found.description: No PreparedSourceView record exists for the supplied view_id.

view.in_use.description: The view already has an in-progress plan (removal or regeneration); finish or cancel it before regenerating.

view.mixed_kind.description: The view is in kind_diverged state. Resolve the divergence before regenerating (D-026-H2, A2, GRILL 2026-05-22).

view.unsupported_kind.description: The view uses a kind not supported in v1 (e.g. hardlink, deferred to v1.x — R-026-Strategies, GRILL 2026-05-22).

lifecycle.read_only.description: The owning project is archived. View operations are not permitted on archived projects. Use the spec 009 unarchive transition (archived → ready) first (R-026-Lifecycle, GRILL 2026-05-22).

allowed_lifecycle_states.description: Lifecycle states in which this operation is permitted.
